_about: Gold-standard retrieval queries for WS3 (mixed personal-documents library built by scripts/build_ws3.ps1). The corpus has one RFC PDF per protocol, one DOCX, one XLSX, and five hand-authored Markdown notes that reference the RFCs. Queries exercise: keyword-direct hits, semantic synonymy, PDF extraction quality (older RFCs rendered via /pdfrfc/), and Markdown-vs-RFC cross-document synthesis. S5.N originally shipped each RFC twice (PDF + TXT) to test cross-format retrieval but the TXT duplicates depressed recall@K without adding extractor coverage; dropped post-investigation. Run: locus_retrieval_eval --workspace D:/Projects/LocusTestWorkspaces/WS3_Documents --queries tests/retrieval_eval/queries_ws3.json --out tests/retrieval_eval/results_ws3.md --baseline tests/retrieval_eval/baseline_ws3_none.json

queries.query: DNS resource records A AAAA CNAME MX
TLS 1.3 zero round trip handshake forward secrecy
IPv4 internet protocol best effort datagram
